name: Garden Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut eggplant into 1/2 inch thick slices and sprinkle both sides with 3 teaspoons salt. Place in a deep dish; cover and let stand for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse the eggplant with cold water, drain, and dry on paper towels. Cut into 1/2 inch cubes and sauté in oil until lightly browned (about 5 minutes).
3. Add onions, garlic, and zucchini; cook for 3 minutes.
4. Add tomatoes, celery, parsley, basil, pepper, and remaining salt; bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes. Remove from the heat; stir in romano cheese.
6. Pour into a greased 9 x 13 baking dish. Combine crumbs and butter; sprinkle on top.
7. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 15 minutes. Sprinkle with mozzarella cheese. Return to the oven for 5 minutes or until cheese is melted.
